name: Corn and Wild Rice Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep the sun-dried tomatoes in the boiling water for 10 minutes.
2. Drain, squeeze dry, and coarsely chop the sun-dried tomatoes.
3. In a medium-size skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
4. Saute the garlic and shallots until softened, about 2 minutes.
5. Add the cooked wild rice and plum tomatoes to the skillet. Cook through for about 4 minutes.
6. Stir in 3 tbsp of balsamic vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Add the chopped basil and stir gently.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature. If serving at room temperature, taste after the dish has set; add additional vinegar as needed, 1 tsp at a time.
